content.full_text:
July 30, 1992

Alice Hughes
FPPC
PO Box 807
Sacramento, CA 95812

Dear Ms. Hughes,

I am writing to you for confirmation of the telephone advice you gave me on July 28, 1992. You indicated that a committee did not have to report contributions made by a spouse if those contributions were made from the spouse's legally separate funds. Could you please confirm this in writing?

Thank you very much for your assistance.

Sincerely,

Kelly Barrales
Treasurer
1116 Foothill Street
Redwood City, CA 94061
(415) 366-2312
